title: [FIRRTL] add EmitModuleSwappingConfig pass
body: Initial implementation of pass that emits config files for configuring VCS and Verilator to use module swapping. For Verilator, emits a filelist for modules to be replaced in the original circuit and a filelist of replacement modules. For VCS, emits VCS-specific compiletime and runtime configs. Will require the ability to read in multiple circuits to be complete.
